plugin_desc: SIAE Microelettronica microwave transmission SNMP child template for devices under enterprise PEN 3373. The shared Transmission SNMP floor supplies MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. This child adds the confirmed sensorTempValue temperature table from SIAE-SENSOR-TEMP-MIB as device_temperature_celsius. CPU, memory, fan and power-supply health are N/A because stable shared device-health objects are not confirmed in the current MIB facts; temperature monitor up/down state is left as alarm context rather than promoted into a generic hardware-state metric.
name: Transmission

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Highest SIAE Microelettronica equipment temperature in degrees Celsius, read from sensorTempValue in SIAE-SENSOR-TEMP-MIB.
